#7 BENSON/BAUER: CONT'D JURY TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. FURTHER JURY INSTRUCTION. BAILIFF SWORN. JURY DELIBERATIONS. JURY RET'D VERDICT IN FAVOR OF DEFT. JURY POLLED AT PLTF REQUEST. EXH'S RETAINED BY COURT. DEFT TO PREPARE JDMT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT VINSON, WALT K. ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $758.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $758.50, DEFT TO RETAIN POSSESSION OF 890 PAGE #6. COSTS PER COST BILL.
